stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
According to NOTAM A1557/14, on the 31st December 2014 there were several cranes erected northeast of OMAL airport…

options.a: within the area bounded by the shown coordinates. The cranes were “H” shaped.
options.b: within the area bounded by the shown coordinates.
options.c: at the positions indicated by the shown coordinates, extended up to 160 ft above Mean Sea Level.
options.d: at the positions indicated by the shown coordinates.
